_note: This file documents the shape of analytics data the admin dashboard displays. Real values are always computed live from the Conversations, Messages, Feedback, and AnalyticsEvent tables by app/services/analytics_service.py — nothing here is read at runtime, it's a reference for what to expect and how demo mode's seeded conversations will populate these views.

tracked_metrics.daily_conversations: Count of conversations created per day, last 14 days — GET /api/v1/analytics/conversations-timeseries
tracked_metrics.user_growth: Count of new user registrations per day, last 30 days — GET /api/v1/analytics/user-growth
tracked_metrics.provider_usage: Count of conversations grouped by which AI provider generated the replies — GET /api/v1/analytics/provider-usage
tracked_metrics.average_response_time_ms: Average of Message.response_time_ms across all assistant messages — part of GET /api/v1/analytics/dashboard
tracked_metrics.top_articles: Knowledge articles ranked by view_count — GET /api/v1/analytics/top-articles
tracked_metrics.feedback_summary: Average rating, positive/negative split, bug report and suggestion counts — GET /api/v1/feedback/summary
